variants.title: HiFi Filter OS 5035 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the SF Filter SAO 56990
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter OS 5035 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the SF Filter SAO 56990
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter OS 5035 Air/Oil Separator is HiFi's replacement to the SF Filter SAO 56990. Easy to install and replace, the OS 5035 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
